cad_masters.notes: New parametric master (bore + tone-hole array only; blowing-edge notch out of scope). Hole positions and L_eff/L_bore derived by formula from design.md, verified by OpenSCAD echo against design.md's published table. Flags a bore_id/wall_thickness discrepancy vs xiao-design-table.xlsx row16/17 col E.

Current dimensional authority (26 keys x 3 bore variants). Note: End Correction row (row 33) formulas reference the Bei Xiao bore row for every column, so live per-column Bore ID cells for Nan Xiao / Qin Xiao are not wired into the acoustic calc chain — see cad/xiao.scad header for the discrepancy this creates against design.md's worked prototype table.
Source-only (not executed); L2 evidence. Pre-existing file, not modified this pass.
